sans.$description: Inter loaded via Google Fonts — the primary Seal UI typeface

line-height-multiplier.$description: Flutter's default line-height multiplier when TextStyle.height is null — TypographyTokens.kDefaultLineHeightMultiplier

body-font-size.$description: Default font size for body text, used as a fallback — TypographyTokens.kBodyFontSize

small-font-size.$description: Default font size for small/caption text, used as a fallback — TypographyTokens.kSmallFontSize

button-icon-size.$description: Default icon size shared across all Seal button components — TypographyTokens.kDefaultButtonIconSize. Scale at runtime with context.dimension.scaled(18)

style.$description: All styles use scaleFactor=1.0 (mobile base). At runtime DefaultTypography(scaleFactor:) multiplies every fontSize: mobile=1.0×, tablet=1.125×, desktop=1.333×. lineHeight values are Flutter height ratios (relative to fontSize).

display.$description: Large display text — hero sections. Matches shadcn h1Large. SealUI: display.

headline.$description: Primary section heading. Matches shadcn h1. SealUI: headline. lineHeight = 40/36 ≈ 1.111.

heading.$description: Secondary section heading. Matches shadcn h2. SealUI: heading. lineHeight = 36/30 = 1.2.

title.$description: Card or dialog headings. Matches shadcn h3. SealUI: title. lineHeight = 32/24 ≈ 1.333.

subtitle.$description: Subsection headings. Matches shadcn h4. SealUI: subtitle. lineHeight = 28/20 = 1.4.

body-large.$description: Emphasized body text, section intros. Matches shadcn large. SealUI: bodyLarge. lineHeight = 28/18 ≈ 1.556.

lead.$description: Introductory paragraph text. Matches shadcn lead. SealUI: lead. Same size as subtitle but regular weight. lineHeight = 28/20 = 1.4.

body.$description: Default readable paragraph text. Matches shadcn p. SealUI: body. lineHeight = 28/16 = 1.75.

small.$description: Secondary / supporting information. Matches shadcn small. SealUI: small.

caption.$description: Labels and metadata. Closest to shadcn muted. SealUI: caption. lineHeight = 20/14 ≈ 1.429.

blockquote.$description: Italic body text. Derived from style.body: same size (16px), weight (400), but italic and compact lineHeight = 24/16 = 1.5. Matches shadcn blockquote.

table.$description: Bold body text for table cells. Derived from style.body: same size (16px) but fontWeight=700 and compact lineHeight = 24/16 = 1.5. Matches shadcn table.

list.$description: List item text. Derived from style.body: same size (16px) and weight (400) but compact lineHeight = 24/16 = 1.5, tighter than body (1.75) to suit list layouts. Matches shadcn list.
